feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Reprovisioning system
entry.content:
Hi Experts

In the new Test system, I have made some mistakes while creating master data, such as the bank key, house bank, BP master, etc. I want to clear all of these master data entries and reset the system to its initial state. Note: I already transported all setting from Dev system to Test System. What should I do? What will happen if I do it? 

Regards

entry.title: How to Mass Update or Add Distribution Chains and Sales Organizations in Product Master Data?
entry.content:
I want to mass update or add Distribution Chains(VTWEG) and Sales Organizations(VKORG) for multiple products.

However, when using the Start Mass Maintenance - Products app, I noticed that the VTWEG (Distribution Chain) and VKORG (Sales Organization) fields are not available for selection, and mass maintenance does not seem possible for these fields.

Could anyone guide me on how to perform a mass update or addition of Distribution Chains and Sales Organizations for products? Is there an alternative approach or tool available for this task?

entry.title: Budget Threshold Alerts for Cost Centers
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

We are using SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition and have enabled budget availability control for cost centers. and are wondering if there is any way to set up budget threshold alerting for cost center budgets.

Specifically, we would like to send an email to the cost center responsible (as assigned in the cost center master data) when the budget threshold is nearing 75%, so they do not have to regularly check the Cost Center Budget Report (F3871).

I know that with project budgets, this can be easily done using a predefined situation handling template (EPPM_PROJBUDGETTHRESHOLDEXCEEDED). However, I couldn't find anything similar for cost centers. Does anyone know how this can be achieved with reasonable effort?

Thank you for your help!

Best regards,
Simon

entry.title: Closed configuration in the CBC
entry.content:
Hi, 

Regarding responses to the BDCQ for Quality Management, I have been exploring the configuration related to QM notifications in the CBC. To my surprise, I have found that most of the configuration is locked and cannot be modified, even though the BDCQ asks whether I want to change the configuration. The configurations that are not available are:

  • Define initial screens;
  • Assign catalogs to notification type
  • Define partner determination procedure
  • Assign partner procedure to notification type
  • Assign partner function to notification type 

Please check the attached images. 

Could you please explain the reason why the configuration is locked and whether there is a possibility to unlock it?

Thank you, 

Ana

entry.title: How to set rounding for picking only a full HU or bag, even if the BOM requires less?
entry.content:
Hello!
Do you know how to set a rounding rule or someting for picking that makes the system to generate a warehouse task for moving the full bag or the full handling unit to the PSA and not just the quantity required for the production order?

Example: An ingredient is stored in bags of 5kg. The recipe to be made requires 7 kg of that ingredient, which is the quantity required from production/the factory. The warehouse has to take two bags to the production supply area so the production people manage whatever they need. How to set the Cloud Public system so it generates a warehouse task for moving the full 2 bags and not only 7 kg?

Best regards

entry.title: Define Priorities in Maintenance Management, S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm implementing SAP S/4HANA Asset Management, Public Cloud Edition.

In the different configuration options available through Central Business Configuration, there is one called 'Define Priorities for Each Priority Type.':

What I need to know is whether there is a configuration point where each Priority Type is associated with a Notification Type and an Order Type, given that both notifications and orders have date fields. If not, do I have to understand that the Priority Type Y1 is always assigned to both the Notification Type Y1 and the Order Type YA01? In this case, when is the system intended to use the Priority Type G0?

Additionally, I understand that new Priority Types cannot be defined and that only the standard ones provided by the system can be used.

Grateful for your reply in advance.

entry.title: Failure Mode Group In Create Maintenance Request App
entry.content:
Hello,

I'm working in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition. In Asset Management, I would like to know if it is possible to select a different code group in Create Maintenance Request App, other than YB-PMGNL. I've created a new code group in Catalog D using the Maintain Code Groups App, but this doesn't appear in dropdown menu. So, Is it always necessary to enter a technical object in order to use different code groups?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: How to create a production order without routing?
entry.content:
I would like to know how to create a production order without routing in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Integration with sftp server in order to push payment files automatically and pull bank statements
entry.content: I would like to set up an integration in Public cloud environment with a third part system via sftp server and aim to automatically send payment files and receive and post bank statements in return. What is the most effective way to do it in public cloud environment?

entry.title: Program to modify for avoid planned GI date update in Transportation Planning with TM
entry.content:
Hello

 

Please which program do i update to change the behavior of planned GI date update in SAP S/4HANA. Because I use this date for pricing at the order level and do not want it to be updated. How can I change this?

entry.title: CDS View for Budget, Commitment
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

We need a CDS view that provides data related to budget, commitment, and actuals against WBS elements. This is crucial for our custom object development, and we require this on a high-priority basis.

Kindly arrange for the required CDS view at the earliest and share the details with us. Let me know if you need any additional information to expedite the process.

Looking forward to your prompt response.

Best regards,

C. Jagadeeswara Reddy

Contact- 9553336948

entry.title: How to configure tolerances for goods receipts in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public?
entry.content:
Hello community,

I'm working in SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public and need to configure tolerances for goods receipts in purchase orders. The requirement is:

- Do not allow excess quantities in goods receipts (0% excess allowed).
- Allow a deficit of almost 100%, that is, allow goods receipts even if only one unit arrives.

Is this always done from the purchase order, or is there a way to manage it through master data or configuration?

Thank you very much for your help.

entry.title: SAP GROW embeded TM - multi pick and multi drop scenario with different carrier
entry.content:
Dear Expert,

Good day, we have opportunity for S4HANA Public Cloud, but the customer raised some requirement in the transportation area. we have check SAP documentation but still cannot finalized the answer.

case TM 1: multidrop with different carrier

  • Truck A (carrier AAA) bring 2 delivery order (freight unit) with customer 1 and customer 2.
  • Truck A start from plant to customer 1, drop delivery order for customer 1 "and hand over" delivery order customer 2 to Truck B (carrier BBB)
  • Truck B (carrier BBB) continue to customer 2 and drop delivery order for customer 2
  • the freight settlement needs to allocate the cost in correct proportion as above
    • cost carrier AAA to be split among delivery order 1 and delivery order 2
    • cost carrier BBB to be split only for delivery 2

Case TM2: same with case above, the difference only it involves multi pick from different plant, the rest will be the same.

can you advise whether this scenario is standard in SAP S4HANA Public Cloud.

Thank you very much.

Best regards, Freddy

entry.title: Automatic Complete and close status in EPPM project in SAP Public cloud
entry.content: In EPPM project can we do the Status Automation. After releasing and completing the postings, can we have a automation in the status for Complete and closed.

entry.title: Assign Financial Statement Versions to Accounting Principles
entry.content:
There is an attempt to change settings in sscui 103215 - assign financial statement versions to accounting principles.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: How to set the BOM to Change Master Required when creating and modifying it
entry.content:
Hello, I would like to use the change number as a mandatory check when creating and modifying the BOM on the CBC of Cloud Public.
I set it up on the path below, but there is an error asking me to enter it even though there is data.

 

Please reply if there is a solution or if there is a route to set the master setting that is required for other BOMs.

Thank you. Please.

entry.title: 自开发Query报表能否实现单位或金额的汇总功能
entry.content: 各位专家老师， 想请教一下在系统内自开发的Query报表，能否实现像系统标准报表一样的汇总或合并呢？ 例：按照库存基本计量单位，实现不同单位的分类汇总；或按照不同货币，实现不同金额的分类汇总。 可参考下图系统标准报表：库存-多种物料

entry.title: How to add custom field in the cloud system ?
entry.content:
Unable to add custom field in Business partner Master Data

entry.title: "Composing and automating with SAP Build the No-Code Way" unit 2 lesson 4 doesn't match trainer
entry.content:
Hi, I'm finding that a crucial hands-on portion of this lesson varies widely from the trainer... see screen grabs. 

The exercise concerns creating a SAP Build mobile barcode scanner that works with a REST API.   After setting up my trial BTP cockpit, I am searching and experimenting in the Build Apps editor screens to attempt to reconcile the current editor with the training guide, I have run up against a failed response in using the API and have had no luck getting past it.  Specifically, the steps for Configuring the REST API Integration from the trainer are not very relevant to the state of the current Build Apps editor. It is a roadblock to finishing the unit and learning journey.  I hope the people involved can make amends here. 

 Here is just one of the screens but many differences exist : Build Apps editor

Trainer shows: Comensurate Trainer screen

Trainer link to Create Your First App With SAP Build Apps 

Thank you.

entry.title: Business partner **** is not blocked; is used in system ****, application ***
entry.content:
Hello there, 

In S/4 Hana Public Cloud i want to delete Workforce Data, therefore i have to Block business Partner Master Data using the App "Block Business Partner" . 

I do get the error message:

Business partner **** is not blocked; is used in system ****, application ***

Further Information: PPM is Component:

 

Application PPM belongs to application component
PPM-CF
 
And BUP : 
Application BUP belongs to application component
AP-MD-BP
 
i looked everywhere but cant find the right application to delete the BP from. Any ideas what App i could delete the BP from or how to find the app?
 
Kind regards, 
Philipp
